title: Second set of EIP Practice Abstracts
subtitle: Deliverable 4.5
description: A deliverable presenting the second set of 30 EIP-AGRI practice abstracts developed in the NetPoulSafe project, detailing successful supporting measures for improving biosecurity compliance in poultry farming. It describes the methodology used by network facilitators across seven European countries to select and format the abstracts and outlines the structure and compilation of these measures into the final deliverable.
